3259250.name: Kami Paper Scissors
3259250.description:
Embark on an epic journey with Kami, a brave young girl navigating through magical pop-up books, where everything is crafted from paper. Armed with your scissors and creativity, you’ll fold origamis and shape the world around you. Solve intricate puzzles and help fascinating characters in this story-rich paper adventure.

Key Features:

  • Fold origamis and cut paper to interact with the environment.

  • Unique puzzle-solving mechanics that blend strategy and creativity.

  • Stunning hand-crafted visuals inspired by paper art and origami.

  • A heartfelt story that mixes fantasy and wonder, leading Kami on her quest to find her way home.

  • Explore imaginative worlds within the pages of magical pop-up books.
3259250.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
